title: fix: default audio transcriptions to whisper
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Whisper by default
gist.blurb: We fixed a tiny routing bug where audio transcriptions weren't defaulting to Whisper Large V3 as intended. Now, if you don't specify a model, we'll automatically use our best listener.
gist.summary: Updated the API gateway to correctly route default audio transcription requests to the whisper-large-v3 model.
gist.impact: Developers can now omit the model parameter on the /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint and reliably get Whisper Large V3, perfectly matching the documentation.
gist.visual_concept: Audio transcription and the Whisper model. Polly the bee wearing headphones, listening to a retro audio device (like a boombox or cassette player) and writing down text on a notepad.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones and holding a small notepad, transcribing audio from a retro boombox. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. The bee has chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
